ddls:
CREATE TABLE "happiness_scores" (
  "rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the country based on happiness score */,
  "country" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "happiness_score" REAL /* Happiness score for the country */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the happiness score was recorded */,
  "generosity_score" REAL /* Score indicating the level of generosity in the society */,
  "perceptions_of_corruption" REAL /* Score indicating the public's perception of corruption */,
  "positive_affect" REAL /* Score indicating the prevalence of positive emotions */,
  "negative_affect" REAL /* Score indicating the prevalence of negative emotions */,
  "population" TEXT /* Population of the country */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the country's capital or central location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the country's capital or central location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rank", "year")
)

CREATE TABLE "economic_factors" (
  "rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the country for correlation with happiness */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the economic data */,
  "gdp_per_capita" REAL /* GDP per capita indicating economic performance */,
  "economy_type" TEXT /* Type of economy (e.g., developed, developing) */,
  "unemployment_rate" REAL /* Unemployment rate in the country */,
  "inflation_rate" REAL /* Inflation rate in the country */,
  "poverty_rate" REAL /* Poverty rate in the country */,
  "gini_index" REAL /* Gini index indicating income inequality */,
  "tax_revenue" REAL /* Tax revenue as a percentage of GDP */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rank", "year")
)

CREATE TABLE "social_support" (
  "rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the country for correlation with happiness */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the social data */,
  "family_score" REAL /* Score indicating family and social support */,
  "freedom_score" REAL /* Score indicating personal freedom and choice */,
  "education_index" REAL /* Score indicating the level of education in the society */,
  "gender_equality_index" REAL /* Score indicating gender equality */,
  "social_safety_net" REAL /* Score indicating the effectiveness of the social safety net */,
  "community_engagement" REAL /* Score indicating community engagement and participation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rank", "year")
)

CREATE TABLE "health_metrics" (
  "rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the country for correlation with happiness */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the health data */,
  "life_expectancy" REAL /* Life expectancy indicating general health */,
  "health_score" REAL /* Health score based on health care quality and access */,
  "mortality_rate" REAL /* Mortality rate in the country */,
  "morbidity_rate" REAL /* Morbidity rate in the country */,
  "mental_health_score" REAL /* Score indicating the mental health status of the population */,
  "access_to_healthcare" REAL /* Score indicating the accessibility of healthcare services */,
  "vaccination_rate" REAL /* Vaccination rate in the population */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rank", "year")
)

CREATE TABLE "trust_metrics" (
  "rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the country for correlation with happiness */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the trust data */,
  "trust_score" REAL /* Trust score related to government performance */,
  "corruption_index" REAL /* Corruption index indicating the level of corruption */,
  "government_effectiveness" REAL /* Score indicating the effectiveness of the government */,
  "judicial_independence" REAL /* Score indicating the independence of the judiciary */,
  "political_stability" REAL /* Score indicating political stability */,
  "civic_engagement" REAL /* Score indicating civic engagement and participation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rank", "year")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "country" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region that the country belongs to */,
  "region_population" TEXT /* Population of the region */,
  "region_gdp" REAL /* GDP of the region */,
  "region_happiness_score" REAL /* Average happiness score of the region */,
  "region_area" REAL /* Area of the region in square kilometers */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country")
)
